name: Dropdown
description: A flexible dropdown menu component with nested menu support, keyboard navigation, and customizable triggers for displaying contextual actions and options.
usage_guidelines: Use for action menus, context menus, or navigation options.
Compose with DropdownItem, DropdownMenu components for menu structure.
Use activeKey to highlight currently active menu item.
Handle onSelect to respond to menu item selections.
Supports nested dropdowns for hierarchical menus.

activeKey.description: Currently active menu item key for highlighting.

eventKey.description: Unique identifier for this dropdown item.

id.description: HTML id attribute for the dropdown.

onSelect.description: Callback fired when a menu item is selected.

styling_info.visual_description: A floating menu panel that appears below or beside a trigger element. Menu items are listed vertically with hover effects. Supports nested submenus that appear on hover or click.

Do: Use for contextual actions and navigation
Provide clear, action-oriented menu item labels
Use dividers to separate item groups
Dont: Don't nest dropdowns too deeply (max 2-3 levels)
Don't use for form inputs (use Select instead)
Don't overload with too many items (consider alternative UI)

Submenu.title: Submenu
Submenu.code:
import Dropdown from '@/components/ui/Dropdown'

const Submenu = () => {
    return (
        <Dropdown title="Click Me!">
            <Dropdown.Item>Item 1</Dropdown.Item>
            <Dropdown.Menu title="Right Item 2">
                <Dropdown.Menu title="Item 2-1">
                    <Dropdown.Item active>Item 2-1-1</Dropdown.Item>
                    <Dropdown.Item>Item 2-1-2</Dropdown.Item>
                    <Dropdown.Item>Item 2-1-3</Dropdown.Item>
                </Dropdown.Menu>
                <Dropdown.Item>Item 2-2</Dropdown.Item>
                <Dropdown.Item>Item 2-3</Dropdown.Item>
            </Dropdown.Menu>
            <Dropdown.Menu title="Right Item 3">
                <Dropdown.Menu title="Item 3-1">
                    <Dropdown.Item>Item 3-1-1</Dropdown.Item>
                    <Dropdown.Item>Item 3-1-2</Dropdown.Item>
                    <Dropdown.Item>Item 3-1-3</Dropdown.Item>
                </Dropdown.Menu>
                <Dropdown.Item>Item 3-2</Dropdown.Item>
                <Dropdown.Item>Item 3-3</Dropdown.Item>
            </Dropdown.Menu>
            <Dropdown.Item>Item 4</Dropdown.Item>
        </Dropdown>
    )
}

export default Submenu
